name: pathfinder
description: Map an unfamiliar repository, choose the highest-value next move, and generate a bounded Claude Code /goal or fallback implementation goal.

interface.shortDescription: Map a repo, pick the next move, write the goal
interface.longDescription: Pathfinder explores an unfamiliar repository from its code, proposes the highest-value next moves, asks a few focused direction questions, then generates a bounded, verifiable Claude Code /goal command or an equivalent implementation goal.
defaultPrompt: Use the pathfinder skill on this repository. Start the full Pathfinder process.
Map this codebase and propose the highest-value next move.
Generate a bounded /goal for the work we just scoped.
Run Pathfinder autonomously on this repository.
Turn this prompt into a runnable /goal: <describe the work you want done>.
